notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum picked off and caught stealing 2nd base. Missed catch error by pitcher George Kirby, assist to pitcher George Kirby.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a ground ball to third baseman J.P. Crawford. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, shortstop Colt Emerson to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, shortstop Colt Emerson to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielding error by third baseman J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Victor Robles to 3rd. J.P. Crawford to 2nd. J.P. Crawford advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Ryan O'Hearn.

notableEvents.label: Cole Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Cole Young out at 1st.
